ai_tool_evidence_links_anchor.name: ai_tool_evidence_links_anchor
ai_tool_evidence_links_anchor.value: ("ai_tool_evidence_links"."raw_page_id" is not null) <> ("ai_tool_evidence_links"."source_revision_id" is not null)

ai_tool_policies_provider_category_uniqu.name: ai_tool_policies_provider_category_unique
ai_tool_policies_provider_category_uniqu.where: "ai_tool_policies"."tool_name" is null and "ai_tool_policies"."category" is not null

feishu_deliveries_notif_recipient_unique.name: feishu_deliveries_notif_recipient_unique
feishu_deliveries_notif_recipient_unique.where: "feishu_notification_deliveries"."event_id" is not null and "feishu_notification_deliveries"."recipient_binding_id" is not null

feishu_deliveries_notif_group_unique.name: feishu_deliveries_notif_group_unique
feishu_deliveries_notif_group_unique.where: "feishu_notification_deliveries"."event_id" is not null and "feishu_notification_deliveries"."recipient_binding_id" is null

search_behaviors_action_page_shape.name: search_behaviors_action_page_shape
search_behaviors_action_page_shape.value: ("search_behaviors"."action" = 'result_open' AND "search_behaviors"."page_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("search_behaviors"."action" = 'escape' AND "search_behaviors"."page_id" IS NULL)
